mapper.sql: id, settlement_amount AS settlementAmount, proprotion, settle_plus_amount AS settlePlusAmount, plus_id AS plusId, indent_id AS indentId, inform, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(settle_plus_amount),0) FROM app_settle_plus WHERE plus_id = #{id} and to_days(create_time) = to_days(now())
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(settle_plus_amount),0) FROM app_settle_plus WHERE plus_id = #{id} and DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m')
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(settle_plus_amount),0) FROM app_settle_plus WHERE plus_id = #{id}
